name: Zucchini Coriander Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, cook the onion in the oil over medium-low heat, stirring until softened.
2. Add zucchini and season with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Cook covered, stirring occasionally for 4 minutes.
4. Add broth and 1 1/4 cups water and simmer covered for 10 minutes or until zucchini is tender.
5. Remove pan from heat and stir in cilantro.
6. Puree the soup in batches using a blender or food processor, transferring to a bowl.
7. Stir in lemon juice and season with salt and pepper to taste.
8. Serve at room temperature or chilled. Makes 4 cups or 4 servings.
